raw_source.title: [Remote] Venturelabs is hiring a Trader, salary $8,000
raw_source.body:
Job Title: Trader

Location: Remote

Monthly salary: $8,000–$9,500

Company: Venturelabs

About Venturelabs:
Venturelabs is an early-stage venture capital fund investing in Web3 and crypto infrastructure. We back bold founders who are building the foundation of the decentralized future. Our core values are bold vision, long-term partnership, technical excellence, and hands-on support for teams.

Mission

Our mission is simple: to empower early-stage technical teams with resources, funding, and mentorship to build the core infrastructure of Web3 and DeFi.

Contact information: vntxlabs@vxnturelabs.com / Telegram: @vxnturelabs

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Trader to help manage the fund’s trading strategies and assets, ensuring efficient capital deployment and supporting portfolio projects. This role combines market analysis, risk management, and strategic liquidity management to drive growth and sustainability of early-stage Web3 and DeFi projects.

Key Responsibilities

Manage trading operations for the fund’s crypto assets and portfolio projects

Develop and implement liquidity management and risk-hedging strategies

Conduct on-chain and off-chain analysis to support investment and operational decisions

Monitor and analyze market data, trends, and arbitrage opportunities

Support portfolio project teams on tokenomics and financial strategies

Collaborate with the Venturelabs team to coordinate trading and capital activities

Qualifications

Experience as a trader in cryptocurrency markets, DEX, or CEX

Knowledge of DeFi products, liquidity, and smart contracts

Experience with on-chain and off-chain data analytics

Strong understanding of risk management and portfolio trading strategies

Ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment and adapt quickly

Experience with Python, Go, SQL, or data analytics tools is a plus

Why Join Venturelabs?

Work with teams building the foundation of Web3 and DeFi

Influence strategic decisions at the early stage of venture investments

Join a fund with hands-on experience from Pear VC, Google, and YouTube

Grow your skills in trading, analytics, and asset management in an innovative environment
